name: The Quiet Quitting
effect: Perform all required tasks at exactly the agreed scope. This card is considered engaged.

clauses.name: SCOPE PROTECTION
clauses.rule: If a task falls outside the job description: It is returned unopened.

clauses.name: VISIBILITY CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If a manager observes this card: They describe it as a performance issue.

clauses.name: CONTINUITY EFFECT
clauses.rule: Each quarter this card remains in play: The card is considered indistinguishable from full participation.

translation_layer.skeptical_question: When did doing the job become the problem?
